topics: Write a C program that contains a string (char pointer) with a value 'Hello World'. The program should XOR each character in this string with 0 and display the result.
Write a C program that contains a string (char pointer) with a value 'Hello World'. The program should AND or and XOR each character in this string with 127 and display the result.
Write a Java program to perform encryption and decryption using Caesar Cipher algorithm.
Write a Java program to perform encryption and decryption using Substitution Cipher algorithm.
Write a Java program to perform encryption and decryption using Hill Cipher algorithm.
Write a Java program to implement the DES algorithm logic.
Write a Java program to implement the Blow-Fish algorithm logic.
Write a Java program to implement RSA Algorithm.
Implement the Diffie-Hellman Key Exchange mechanism using HTML and JavaScript. Consider the end user as one of the parties (Alice) and the JavaScript application as other party (Bob).
Calculate the message digest of a text using the SHA-1 algorithm in JAVA.
Write a Java program to implement Diffie Hellman Key Exchange.
Write a Java program to implement AES algorithm.
